mapper.select: /* 모델 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID AS VALUE , A.MODEL_NAME AS LABEL , A.PROVIDER_ID , A.VERSION , A.INPUT_COST , A.OUTPUT_COST , A.USE_YN , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORDER , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_LLM_MDL A ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER

/* RAG 데이터 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectRagDsList */ SELECT A.DATASET_ID AS VALUE , A.DS_NM AS LABEL , A.DESCRIPTION , A.VERSION , A.ICON_TEXT , A.ICON_COLOR , A.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD , A.EMBED_MODEL , A.VECTOR_DB , A.CHUNK_ALGO , A.CHUNK_SIZE , A.CHUNK_OVERLAP , A.MIN_CHUNK_SZ , A.HDR_INCL , A.EMBED_NORM , A.POOL_STRAT , A.DIM_REDUC , A.CHUNK_CNT , A.DOC_CNT , A.URL_CNT , A.SRCH_QUAL , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_RAG_DS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE'

/* 데이터마트 조회 ai.chatbot.selectDmList */ SELECT A.DATAMART_ID AS VALUE , A.DM_NM AS LABEL , A.DESCRIPTION , A.USE_YN , A.DSPL_ORD , A.DB_TYPE , A.DB_VERSION , A.HOST , A.PORT , A.DB_NM , A.USERNAME , A.PWD_ENC , A.SCH_NM , A.CONN_OPT , A.READONLY_YN , A.IP_WLIST_YN , A.SSL_YN , A.TBL_CNT , A.LAST_VERIFY_DT , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DM A ORDER BY DSPL_ORD
mapper.insert: /* CHAT 대화방 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRoom */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_TITLE, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{roomTitle}, #{userId}, NOW())
